description: A vendor and a government agency need to amend an existing contract to extend its duration.

nodes.task_description: Locate the existing contract in the contract management system.

expected_outcome.expected: The contract manager finds the correct contract.

nodes.task_description: Draft a contract amendment document outlining the new end date.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager creates a formal amendment.

nodes.task_description: Route the amendment for signature by both the vendor and the authorized government official.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager sends the amendment for electronic signature.
